Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Segmentation > Psychographic segmentation > Affect and emotion-regulation profile > Discrete-emotion proneness > Sadness proneness

Prepare.path: Prepare > Establish Assets > Targeting-data acquisition (legal commercial + black market + scraping) > Commercial people-data vendors > Marketing-data brokers > TransUnion TruAudience

exposure_network_assignment.edge_meaning: The source position is a visible peer whose output was plausibly exposed to the target position; derived from source user liking, reposting, or quoting target user content in the raw data.
